description: CompositionPurple checked round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short puffed sleeves and a concealed zipper on the sideFitRegularWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this luxe top with its plush fabric. The classic checks in this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this top from s.oliver with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes, and a structured blazer.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
